title: Narrow vs Broad Antibiotics
script_summary: Explore the critical differences between narrow and broad-spectrum antibiotics and their implications in medicine.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about narrow vs broad antibiotics than social media does.
Narrow antibiotics target specific bacteria, while broad antibiotics attack a wide range.
Using broad antibiotics can kill good bacteria too, leading to issues like superbugs.
Studies show that narrow antibiotics can effectively treat infections with fewer side effects.
In healthcare, the right choice can mean the difference between recovery and complications.
Stay informed about antibiotics. Follow for more science insights!
